---
title: "Meeting Minutes"
date: "March 2, 2026"
date-modified: last-modified
---

# Project Log & Minutes

This page serves as a comprehensive record of our team's progress, decisions, and action items throughout the semester.

---

## Meeting 1
**Date:** 2 March 2026  
**Time:** 10:15 AM – 10:30 AM
**Location:** Virtual
**Attendees:** Choo Yi Ning, Saanvi Madan

### Agenda
1. Discuss Proposal
3. Set up the Quarto website environment.

### Discussion Points
...

### Action Items
| Task | Assigned To | Status |
|------|------------|--------|
| Set up website | Yi Ning | Completed |

---
